dict.string: The floating K4L button opens Gallery Upload, Files, Media Vault, and in-app diagnostics.

Images support rotation, center crop, and resize. Videos support trim ranges, export quality selection, and poster-frame thumbnails. Caption, account, friend, and category metadata are stored in the vault.

The resident daemon uses Darwin notifications as triggers and versioned command/result files, preferences, SQLite, cached container identity, diagnostics history, and backups for durable state. Account category masks follow the recovered bit 0 override, bits 1–4 global seed, and bits 5–6 account-only model.

k4lsnapd performs periodic integrity checks, stale draft cleanup, thumbnail repair, container discovery, command processing, diagnostics history, and backup coordination. k4lsnapctl exposes the same cross-process protocol.
